title: Distorted Discs
description: Adds 50+ new records that can be found throughout your world. Vanilla Style. Music by BBoldt.
body:
## For Fabric, Quilt, Forge, & NeoForge ![Distorted Discs](https://i.imgur.com/p90VXW8.png)

**Features:** Experience the magic of over 50 new music discs waiting to be discovered in your dungeons, all featuring the music of [BBoldt](https://soundcloud.com/bboldt). These discs span various genres, providing the perfect soundtrack for your adventures.

[![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/efda2a0b808876b7c1c0074c1f765ae8abdbc891_0.webp)](https://minecraftstorage.com/mods/distorted-discs "more info")

**Dependencies**
Certain versions of this mod depend on Loot Integrations mod and Cupboard (1.21.1, 1.16.5, and 1.18.2), unfortunately they are not available on Modrinth. Make sure to download and install the correct version for the version of Minecraft you are using. 

[Loot Integrations](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/loot-integrations)

[Cupboard](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cupboard)

**Song Previews:**
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/KNtWmGh1Lsw" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/4vD-7QA92g4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/kpHQInOjDHY" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**Distorted Discs (Overworld):** Explore the vast and varied landscapes of the Overworld with:
- BBoldt - 53-X
- BBoldt - Bayou
- BBoldt, James Svedka - Bounce
- BBoldt - Cruisin
- BBoldt - Deflective
- BBoldt - Friendly Fire
- BBoldt - Funky Ninja
- BBoldt - Lean
- BBoldt - M$ Paint
- BBoldt - Rook
- BBoldt - Scissor Kick
- BBoldt - Tesla
- BBoldt - The Great Freeze
- BBoldt, JoseJFB, L4ndo - Transcendental Fire
- BBoldt - Air Traffic
- BBoldt - Motives
- BBoldt - Faustian Reverie

**Interdimensional Distorted Discs (End):** Venture into the mystical End dimension and let the music guide your way with:
- BBoldt - Back in Time
- BBoldt - Bitbashed
- BBoldt - Chill Vibez
- BBoldt - Chrono Courier
- BBoldt - Duck Dodgers
- BBoldt - Electric Knights
- BBoldt - Indigo Entrance
- BBoldt - Look Deeper
- BBoldt - Venus
- BBoldt - ytinretE
- BBoldt - Zoom
- BBoldt - BB-5022
- BBoldt - The Light

**Demonic Distorted Discs (Nether):** Descend into the fiery Nether and let the dark tunes accompany your journey with:
- BBoldt - Backwards
- BBoldt - Block City
- BBoldt - Doo Wop Ghosts
- BBoldt - Emergency
- BBoldt - Firewalker
- BBoldt - March of the Undead
- BBoldt - Necromancer's Laboratory
- BBoldt - Order of the Dragon
- BBoldt - Reverse the Polarity
- BBoldt - The Machine
- BBoldt - Light
- BBoldt - Sanguine
- BBoldt - BB-6666
- BBoldt - Armageddon

**Damp Distorted Discs (Ocean):** Embark on aquatic adventures in the deep Ocean, all while being serenaded by the following compositions:
- BBoldt - Dubtime 5
- BBoldt - Lane 6
- BBoldt - Moon
- BBoldt - Sailing
- BBoldt - Search
- BBoldt - Stranded
- BBoldt - The Bounce
- BBoldt - Obversions
- BBoldt - Bubble
- BBoldt - Slime

Feel free to add this into any modpack and share your musical experiences on videos and streams. Just remember to credit [BBoldt](https://soundcloud.com/bboldt). Thanks for supporting the artist!

**Recommended Companion Mods:**
- [Created Music Discs](https://modrinth.com/mod/created-music-discs) (Use this mod for an alternative to searching loot chests for records, crafting recipes for all of Distorted Discs! Official support.)
- [Sophisticated Backpacks](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sophisticated-backpacks) (you will find mobs with backpacks bumping my tunes occasionally)
- [Just Enough Resources (JER)](https://modrinth.com/mod/just-enough-resources-jer)
- [Better Jukeboxes](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-jukeboxes) (makes jukeboxes look way cooler)

**Connect:**
- [Discord](https://discord.gg/DBa5seBxRh)

[Need a server? Use code 'bboldt' on Bisect Hosting](https://bisecthosting.com/bboldt).
